title: [NO TESTS NEEDED] Make an advanced layer diff function private
body: Noticed this while I was poking around in the runtime doing DB work. The signature of this function makes me a bit uncomfortable (why should we let people apply arbitrary diffs to layers? Seems like a good way to break things...) and it's completely unused, so make it private to remove from our public API.

comments.body: That validation code is telling you to just remove the function.
Works for me. Re-pushed with a complete removal.

Needs [NO TESTS NEEDED]
This should be default when only code is being removed.
